title: rosa × damascena f. trigintipetala
intro: Rosa × damascena f. trigintipetala, also known as the Damask rose or Bulgarian rose, is a fragrant, flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa × damascena f. trigintipetala include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include rose oil, rose water, and dried rose petals, which can be used in teas, skincare products, and aromatherapy.
